text: Diagnosed why the BotBeam backend console floods with 'watchfiles - N change detected' spam on startup: running the app as a script (python main.py) leaks the app's logging_config into uvicorn's reload supervisor, unlike TableThat and the live Knowledge Horizon backend which start cleanly. Compared start methods across the three repos and edited logging_config.py to quiet the reloader. Also found and fixed a frontend/backend port mismatch (frontend was hitting 8000, which collides with the live KH process, corrected to 4888). Concluded with a rundown of four ways to launch the backend, recommending 'python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4888' for dev and the same without --reload for the long-running agent/C2 process, and to avoid bare 'uvicorn main:app' which defaults to the wrong port.
